structuredContent.stdout: 1 import { ToolbarGroup } from '@patternfly/react-core'; 2 3 import { FilterFromDef } from './FilterFromDef'; 4 import type { MetaFilterProps } from './types'; 5 6 /** 7 * This is an implementation of [``PatternFly 4`` filter group](https://www.patternfly.org/v4/demos/filters/design-guidelines/#filter-group) pattern, 8 * extended to use any filter matching FilterTypeProps interface (not only enum based selection but also free text, boolean switch and grouped enum based). 9 * 10 * [ 11 * View component source on GitHub](https://github.com/kubev2v/forklift-console-plugin/blob/main/packages/common/src/components/FilterGroup/FilterGroup.tsx) 12 * 13 * @see FilterTypeProps 14 */ 15 export const FilterGroup = ({ 16 fieldFilters, 17 onFilterUpdate, 18 resolvedLanguage = 'en', 19 selectedFilters = {}, 20 supportedFilterTypes, 21 }: MetaFilterProps) => ( 22 23 {fieldFilters.map(({ filterDef, label, resourceFieldId }) => ( 24 36 ))} 37 38 );

content.text:
Now let me analyze the migration rule and the incident:

**Incident**: `ToolbarGroup` signature changed - the type changed from `Omit<React.HTMLProps<HTMLDivElement>, 'ref'>` to `Omit<React.HTMLProps<HTMLDivElement>, 'ref' | 'onToggle'>`.

This is a signature change where `onToggle` is now omitted from the props type. Let me check if this file uses `onToggle` on `ToolbarGroup`:

Looking at the file:
- Line 22: `<ToolbarGroup variant="filter-group">` — only uses `variant` prop
- The `variant` prop value `"filter-group"` is still valid in v6 (it's listed in both old and new variant types)
- No `onToggle` prop is used on `ToolbarGroup`

So the signature change (`onToggle` now omitted from the base HTML props) doesn't affect this file at all — the file doesn't use `onToggle` on `ToolbarGroup`.

The import is already correct (`ToolbarGroup` from `@patternfly/react-core`), the `variant="filter-group"` value is still valid in v6, and no affected props are used.

**No changes are needed.** The code is already compatible with the v6 API change.

## Changes Applied

- **No changes needed.** The migration rule flags a signature change on `ToolbarGroup` where `onToggle` is now omitted from the base HTML props type (`Omit<..., 'ref'>` → `Omit<..., 'ref' | 'onToggle'>`). This file does not use `onToggle` on `ToolbarGroup` — it only uses `variant="filter-group"`, which remains valid in v6. The code is already compatible with the new API.
